positive: A stylized, symmetrical, minimalist celestial map composition featuring abstract constellations and flowing nebulae. The central element is a stylized crescent moon intertwined with geometric line art constellations (e.g., Orion, Ursa Minor) rendered in glowing neon sapphire and electric amethyst. The background should be deep space indigo with subtle gradients of teal and black. Use clean, thick silhouettes for the major celestial bodies and intricate, fine lines for the constellation paths. The overall style must be neo-geometric, vaporwave inspired, and suitable for a high-contrast, screen-printed T-shirt design. Composition should maximize negative space while keeping the design centrally focused and balanced. Studio lighting, high clarity, vector graphic quality, clean lines.
